name: Food Bank of North Alabama
description: Serving Madison, Huntsville, and surrounding counties with food assistance programs, mobile pantries, and nutrition education for families in need throughout the Tennessee Valley.

name: Habitat for Humanity of Madison County
description: Building affordable homes and providing home repair services for families throughout Madison County. They also operate a ReStore thrift store to support their building programs.

name: United Way of Madison County
description: Connecting North Alabama residents with essential services including education support, financial stability programs, and health resources. Dial 211 for immediate assistance finding local help.
